title: Pope Leo Calls for Nuclear Disarmament in Latest Antiwar Message
summary_full: In a new book published on Tuesday, Leo said that a race to nuclear de-escalation has been “obscured by a race to armament that today frightens and terrifies.”
summary_public: In a new book published on Tuesday, Leo said that a race to nuclear de-escalation has been “obscured by a race to armament that today frightens and terrifies.”
